name: limena
description: limena's official plugin marketplace — connect accessibility audits, fix-story generation, and program management to Claude.

plugins.name: limena — accessibility audits
plugins.summary: Audit any web URL for WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility, walk findings with Claude, and apply fixes directly.
plugins.description: limena's audit plugin lets Claude drive accessibility scans against your hosted limena workspace. Conversational flow: pick a client, pick a program, queue audits across one or many URLs, poll until ready, summarize findings, and apply fix stories. Pairs axe-core deterministic detection with an LLM heuristic engine for content-quality checks (alt text, link text, sensory cues, error messages, language). Use it when you want WCAG 2.2 AA compliance, AODA / Accessible Canada Act / Section 508 / EN 301 549 / Quebec Law 25 support, or just to know whether your site is accessible.

auth.instructions: Generate a workspace API key at https://console.limena.app/settings/api-keys. You'll need admin role in your limena workspace. Recommended scopes for this plugin: read + write.

permissions.summary: Calls limena's /api/v1/* endpoints scoped to your workspace's API key.
details: List clients and programs in your workspace
Queue audits on URLs in a program you specify
